name: TMC the metals company Inc. Warrants
summary: TMC the metals company Inc. is a deep-sea minerals company focused on collecting polymetallic nodules from the ocean floor to extract metals such as nickel, copper, cobalt, and manganese, which are essential for electric vehicle batteries and renewable energy technologies. The company aims to provide a secure and sustainable supply of these metals while minimizing environmental impact. TMC is headquartered in Vancouver, Canada.
